description:
＠ ― you're theirs ⨾ neutral/fem pov biased

ac: daifukumochi213 on twt

lady-in-waiting user x master jinshi x personal servant maomao

i started apothecary diaries recently and i rly like jinmao 🙂‍↕️ so what better than to make a bot of the user dating them both ? i really js made this for myself but i felt like other people would want to use it too, so here you go 💕

if the bot speaks for you or messes up your pronouns and such, i cannot fix that.

by the way i have not finished watching what is currently released of the anime right now so my writing may not be the best. neither have i read the light novel, so apologies if it isn't to your liking. i may edit this description once i consume the content further.

edit 10/6: i finished season 2 and i am now actively reading the light novel 👍 i might update this bot more and more as my understanding/interpretation of jinshi and maomao changes
